introSection:
Magic Loop is a steel roller coaster travelling in Brazil.

This roller coaster arrived at Galaxy Park in Bolivia between October and December 2014. By June 2015, it had been dismantled. It returned in September 2016, and was dismantled once again between August 2018 and January 2019.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: Pink track with white supports and a "Magic Loop" sign above the single vertical loop.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The trains are the most modern type of Pinfari Zyklon trains.

fullText:
Magic Loop is a steel roller coaster travelling in Brazil.

This roller coaster arrived at Galaxy Park in Bolivia between October and December 2014. By June 2015, it had been dismantled. It returned in September 2016, and was dismantled once again between August 2018 and January 2019.

Pink track with white supports and a "Magic Loop" sign above the single vertical loop.

The trains are the most modern type of Pinfari Zyklon trains.


 * Photograph of this coaster at Galaxy Park
